# Port target: `@eslint/markdown`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/eslint/markdown |
| Submodule | `upstream/eslint-markdown` @ `v8.0.2` |
| Baseline npm version | `8.0.2` |
| License | MIT |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 21 |

> Language plugin: lints Markdown files. Out of Oxlint's current JS/TS scope; tracked for completeness and a possible future language target.

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description | Docs |
|---|------|-------------|------|
| 1 | `fenced-code-language` | Require languages for fenced code blocks | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/fenced-code-language.md) |
| 2 | `fenced-code-meta` | Require or disallow metadata for fenced code blocks | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/fenced-code-meta.md) |
| 3 | `heading-increment` | Enforce heading levels increment by one | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/heading-increment.md) |
| 4 | `no-bare-urls` | Disallow bare URLs | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-bare-urls.md) |
| 5 | `no-duplicate-definitions` | Disallow duplicate definitions | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-duplicate-definitions.md) |
| 6 | `no-duplicate-headings` | Disallow duplicate headings in the same document | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-duplicate-headings.md) |
| 7 | `no-empty-definitions` | Disallow empty definitions | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-empty-definitions.md) |
| 8 | `no-empty-images` | Disallow empty images | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-empty-images.md) |
| 9 | `no-empty-links` | Disallow empty links | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-empty-links.md) |
| 10 | `no-html` | Disallow HTML tags | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-html.md) |
| 11 | `no-invalid-label-refs` | Disallow invalid label references | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-invalid-label-refs.md) |
| 12 | `no-missing-atx-heading-space` | Disallow headings without a space after the hash characters | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-missing-atx-heading-space.md) |
| 13 | `no-missing-label-refs` | Disallow missing label references | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-missing-label-refs.md) |
| 14 | `no-missing-link-fragments` | Disallow link fragments that do not reference valid headings | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-missing-link-fragments.md) |
| 15 | `no-multiple-h1` | Disallow multiple H1 headings in the same document | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-multiple-h1.md) |
| 16 | `no-reference-like-urls` | Disallow URLs that match defined reference identifiers | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-reference-like-urls.md) |
| 17 | `no-reversed-media-syntax` | Disallow reversed link and image syntax | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-reversed-media-syntax.md) |
| 18 | `no-space-in-emphasis` | Disallow spaces around emphasis markers | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-space-in-emphasis.md) |
| 19 | `no-unused-definitions` | Disallow unused definitions | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/no-unused-definitions.md) |
| 20 | `require-alt-text` | Require alternative text for images | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/require-alt-text.md) |
| 21 | `table-column-count` | Disallow data rows in a GitHub Flavored Markdown table from having more cells than the header row | [docs](https://github.com/eslint/markdown/blob/main/docs/rules/table-column-count.md) |
